/bin/zsh -lc "./.venv/bin/python - <<'PY'
from sympy import Symbol
s = Symbol('s')
print(Symbol.__mro__)
for cls in Symbol.__mro__:
    print(f'{cls.__module__}.{cls.__name__}: own_slots={cls.__dict__.get(\"__slots__\", \"<missing>\")"'!r}; own_dict_descriptor={"__dict__" in cls.__dict__}'"')
print('instance dict?', getattr(s, '__dict__', '<no dict>'))
PY"

/bin/zsh -lc "nl -ba sympy/core/symbol.py | sed -n '1,235p'
nl -ba sympy/core/expr.py | sed -n '20,60p;3840,3880p'
rg -n \""'^class Boolean|__slots__" sympy/logic/boolalg.py sympy/core/logic.py sympy/core | head -n 120
./.venv/bin/python - <<'"'PY'
from sympy import Symbol
from sympy.core.basic import Basic, Atom
from sympy.core.expr import Expr, AtomicExpr
s=Symbol('s')
print(type(s).__mro__)
for c in type(s).__mro__:
    print(c, c.__dict__.get('__slots__', '<missing>'))
print('Symbol dict?', hasattr(s, '__dict__'), s.__dict__ if hasattr(s,'__dict__') else None)
for c in [Basic,Atom,Expr,AtomicExpr,Symbol]:
    try: print(c.__name__, hasattr(c(), '__dict__'))
    except Exception as e: print(c.__name__, type(e).__name__, e)
PY"

/bin/zsh -lc "nl -ba sympy/core/_print_helpers.py | sed -n '1,35p'
nl -ba sympy/core/basic.py | sed -n '1,82p'
nl -ba sympy/core/symbol.py | sed -n '175,210p'
nl -ba sympy/core/expr.py | sed -n '1,45p;3850,3870p'
nl -ba sympy/logic/boolalg.py | sed -n '55,72p'
./.venv/bin/python - <<'PY'
from sympy import Basic, Integer, Symbol
from sympy.core._print_helpers import Printable
for cls in (Printable, Basic, Integer, Symbol):
    print(cls.__name__, '__dictoffset__=', cls.__dictoffset__, '__weakrefoffset__=', cls.__weakrefoffset__)
for obj in (Basic(), Integer(1), Symbol('s')):
    print(type(obj).__name__, hasattr(obj, '__dict__'), getattr(obj, '__dict__', None))
PY"
